examples: Undeterred, he crept into the cemetery under the cloak of darkness with a bemused sculptor in tow.
Parents clap and shriek with laughter while children look on with bemused grins as the daily ritual is performed.
He was rather bemused by children.
When asked about the scheduling quirk, most of the people involved reacted with bemused indifference.
James McKenna, spokesman for the Spirit of Shankly supporters' group, said the decision left him bemused.
